entity.label: Uzzi
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The son of Bukki, and a descendant of Aaron (1 Chr. 6:5, 51; Ezra 7:4).

nodes.label: Uzzi
nodes.description: The son of Bukki, and a descendant of Aaron (1 Chr. 6:5, 51; Ezra 7:4).

verses.text: And Abishua begat Bukki, and Bukki begat Uzzi,
And Uzzi begat Zerahiah, and Zerahiah begat Meraioth,
Bukki his son, Uzzi his son, Zerahiah his son,
The son of Zerahiah, the son of Uzzi, the son of Bukki,
